_comment: Copy to corpus.json (gitignored) and set cwd to absolute project paths on your machine. Each project: { name, cwd (abs dir), args (compiler args, e.g. -p tsconfig.json --noEmit) }. The harness appends --extendedDiagnostics. Use modern-config projects (target>=ES2015, module esnext/nodenext) so tsgo/TSTS support them.
